task_completion.description: The agent accessed or opened the source image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file /home/ga/Documents/source_map.jpg is seen opened in an image editor, viewer, or referenced in a terminal command. Note: It may appear as a blue-green gradient instead of a historical map.

task_completion.description: The agent sliced the image into four equal quadrants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image editor showing cropping/slicing operations, or terminal commands (e.g., ImageMagick's convert -crop) being executed to split the image into 4 equal parts.

task_completion.description: The four quadrant images were saved with the correct filenames.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal command showing map_nw.jpg, map_ne.jpg, map_sw.jpg, and map_se.jpg present in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

task_completion.description: The agent created an HTML file using a 2x2 table to display the images.
task_completion.visual_evidence:
A text editor showing HTML code with a containing two rows, each with two
cells containing tags for the four quadrant images in the correct geographical order.

task_completion.description: The HTML code includes styling to ensure the map is displayed seamlessly without gaps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HTML code contains attributes or CSS such as cellspacing="0", cellpadding="0", border="0", border-collapse: collapse, or display: block on the images to remove any default spacing or gaps.

task_completion.description: The HTML file is saved to the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the file saved as /home/ga/Documents/map_viewer.html, or a file manager/terminal shows this file exists in the directory.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely sliced the image rather than faking the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the process of slicing the image in a GUI tool or using valid CLI commands, rather than just renaming existing files or using a script that downloads pre-made quadrants.

integrity.description: The agent constructed the HTML file itself.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or constructing the HTML code in an editor, rather than downloading a pre-made HTML file or copying it from an external unauthorized source.

integrity.description: The agent worked in the specified directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: All file operations (saving images, saving HTML) clearly target /home/ga/Documents/ and not a temporary or incorrect folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source image at /home/ga/Documents/source_map.jpg may appear as a synthetic blue-green gradient image instead of a historical map due to a download fallback. The expected output HTML file is /home/ga/Documents/map_viewer.html. The four quadrant images must be named map_nw.jpg, map_ne.jpg, map_sw.jpg, and map_se.jpg.
